Rare ingredients, often dependent on nature and requiring immense patience, are becoming the stars. Saffron, Matsutake mushrooms, Kopi Luwak coffee, Beluga caviar, and White Alba truffles exemplify this trend. Their scarcity and unique production methods contribute to their high prices, showcasing the diverse and fascinating world of food.
